_baseworks_meta.slo_note: Warning when any tenant's bytes_used / COALESCE(bytes_limit, STORAGE_DEFAULT_QUOTA_BYTES) reaches 90%. Forward-looking: requires custom-metrics wiring (v1.4+ OTLP) to emit storage.quota.pct per tenant. Until then, operators monitor via /health/detailed data.storage.quota.topTenants[].pctUsed (tenantsAtWarn). At the health level >=90% is informational only (no degrade); this Sentry alert is the actual warning surface.
